projects.name: Bookworm - Library Management App
projects.description: Developed a cross-platform library management system using Flutter and backend. Implemented features like user authentication, book catalog with search/filter/sort, room reservation, borrow/return books, due date tracking, and admin functions for managing books, categories, users, and monitoring history. Designed a responsive and user-friendly UI.

projects.name: CPMAD_ECommerceApp - Laptop Store App
projects.description: Built a cross-platform e-commerce application deployed on Android, Web, and Windows. Implemented user authentication, product catalog with variants, search/filter/sort, shopping cart, checkout with coupons and loyalty points. Developed order management with tracking, history, email confirmation, and integrated real-time reviews & ratings via WebSocket. Designed an admin dashboard for product, user, order, and coupon management with analytical charts. Responsible for frontend–backend integration in Flutter, core business logic, and API flows.

projects.name: VOPET - English Vocabulary Learning App
projects.description: Built an application for English vocabulary learning, allowing users to create topics, study, and take tests in various forms. Implemented topic & folder management, CSV import/export, text-to-speech, and progress tracking. Enabled community features like public topic sharing, leaderboards, and achievements. Applied advanced design patterns to optimize code and integrated Firebase for authentication and real-time sync.
